name: customer-support-classifier
description: Classifies an incoming customer support message into: urgent, billing, technical, or general. Routes urgent ones to a Slack webhook.

config.input: Hi, my server has been down for 2 hours and I'm losing customers. Please help URGENT

config.system: You are a customer support classifier. Classify the message into exactly one of these categories: urgent, billing, technical, general. Respond with ONLY the category word, nothing else.

config.thenValue: ESCALATE: This is an urgent ticket that needs immediate human attention.
config.elseValue: Standard ticket. Add to normal queue.
